title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Medical Commission Act, 2019. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act and any reference in any such provision to the commencement of this Act shall be construed as a reference to the coming into force of that provision.
footnote: 1. 2nd September, 2019---Sections 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 11, 16, 17, 18, 19, 56 and 57, vide notification No. S.O. 3162(E), dated 2nd September, 2019, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). 25th September, 2020--all the remaining provisions, vide notification No. S.O. 3262(E), dated 24th September, 2020, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3, Sub-section(ii).
